_comment: Cost and routing configuration for multi-harness dispatch. Update costs here without code changes.

claude.notes: Default harness for complex reasoning and general tasks

claude-code.notes: Embedded harness — wraps Claude Code Agent tool; always available

codex.notes: Code generation via OpenAI API; requires OPENAI_API_KEY

gemini.notes: Multimodal + large context via Google AI; requires GOOGLE_AI_KEY
